fields.name: Essential AI
fields.description: Creators of RNJ models.

fields.name: TII

fields.name: Eric Hartford
fields.description: Independent researcher. Creator of Dolphin fine-tunes.

fields.name: StepFun
fields.description: Chinese AI company. Creators of Step models.

fields.name: ByteDance
fields.description: Creators of Seed and Doubao models.

fields.name: OpenAI
fields.description: OpenAI

fields.name: Google
fields.description: Google DeepMind

fields.name: Anthropic
fields.description: Anthropic

fields.name: DeepSeek
fields.description: DeepSeek AI

fields.name: Microsoft

fields.name: xAI
fields.description: xAI

fields.name: Llama
fields.description: Meta's open-source large language model family. Ranges from 1B to 405B parameters. Known for strong instruction following, multilingual support, and tool use. The most widely deployed open model family in the world. Llama 3.2 introduced compact 1B/3B models; Llama 3.1 scaled to 405B; Llama 4 added MoE architecture with vision.

fields.name: Nomic Embed
fields.description: Nomic AI's open embedding models. Produce 768-dimensional vectors with large token context windows. The default embedding engine for Are-Self's Hippocampus memory system.

fields.name: GPT-OSS
fields.description: OpenAI's open-weight models. Designed for powerful reasoning, agentic tasks, and versatile developer use cases. Available in 20B and 120B sizes with tool use and thinking support.

fields.name: GLM
fields.description: Zhipu AI's General Language Model family. Strong multilingual performance with thinking and tool support. GLM-4.7 Flash is the strongest in the 30B class, balancing performance and efficiency.

fields.name: Command
fields.description: Cohere's enterprise language models. Optimized for conversational interaction, retrieval-augmented generation, and long context tasks. Strong tool use capabilities.

fields.name: Granite
fields.description: IBM's enterprise foundation models for code and language. Designed for tool-based use cases, RAG, and code intelligence. Available in dense and MoE architectures.

fields.name: CodeLlama
fields.description: Meta's code-specialized Llama models. Trained on code-heavy datasets for generation, completion, and code discussion. Available from 7B to 70B.

fields.name: Hermes
fields.description: NousResearch's instruction-tuned models. General purpose with strong tool use. Built on various base models (Llama, Mixtral) with high-quality training data.

fields.name: Dolphin
fields.description: Eric Hartford's uncensored fine-tunes. General purpose local models enabling coding, math, agentic tasks, and function calling without alignment restrictions.

fields.name: StarCoder
fields.description: BigCode's open code generation models. Trained transparently on permissive-licensed code. Available from 3B to 15B parameters.

fields.name: LLaVA
fields.description: Large Language and Vision Assistant. End-to-end trained multimodal models combining vision encoders with language models for general-purpose visual and language understanding.

fields.name: Qwen
fields.description: Alibaba's multilingual large language model family. Pretrained on up to 18 trillion tokens. Supports 128K context with strong performance across English, Chinese, and many other languages. Known for excellent coding, math, and reasoning capabilities.

fields.name: Falcon
fields.description: Technology Innovation Institute's open language models. Designed for summarization, text generation, and conversational use. Available from 7B to 180B.

fields.name: Nemotron
fields.description: NVIDIA's enterprise-grade language models. Customized for helpfulness in enterprise applications. Strong tool use and instruction following.

fields.name: Codestral
fields.description: Mistral AI's first dedicated code generation model. 22B parameters optimized specifically for code tasks.

fields.name: Devstral
fields.description: Mistral AI's model for software engineering agents. Excels at codebase exploration, multi-file editing, and powering coding agents.

fields.name: Magistral
fields.description: Mistral AI's reasoning model. Small, efficient 24B model with thinking token support for complex reasoning tasks.

fields.name: Ministral
fields.description: Mistral AI's edge deployment family. Designed for wide hardware compatibility including mobile and IoT devices. Vision and tool capable.

fields.name: Yi
fields.description: 01.AI's bilingual language models. High-performing in English and Chinese.

fields.name: Vicuna
fields.description: UC Berkeley's chat model based on Llama. One of the earliest high-quality open chat models, trained on user-shared conversations.

fields.name: Cogito
fields.description: DeepCogito's hybrid reasoning models. Outperform counterparts from Llama, DeepSeek, and Qwen at similar sizes across standard benchmarks.

fields.name: QwQ
fields.description: Qwen's dedicated reasoning model. Uses extended thinking tokens for complex problem-solving with tool use support.

fields.name: Qwen Coder
fields.description: Code-specialized Qwen models optimized for code generation, reasoning, fixing, and agentic coding workflows. Support function calling and long context for repository-scale understanding.

fields.name: Solar
fields.description: Upstage's compact language models. Designed for single-turn conversation and efficient deployment.

fields.name: BGE
fields.description: BAAI's embedding models. Versatile multi-functionality, multi-linguality, and multi-granularity for retrieval tasks.

fields.name: Snowflake Arctic
fields.description: Snowflake's text embedding models. Optimized for enterprise retrieval performance across multiple sizes.

fields.name: mxbai
fields.description: Mixedbread AI's embedding models. State-of-the-art large embeddings for semantic search and retrieval.

fields.name: OLMo
fields.description: Allen Institute for AI's open language models. Designed to enable the science of language models with fully open data, code, and training recipes.

fields.name: DBRX
fields.description: Databricks' open general-purpose MoE model. 132B total parameters designed for enterprise use.

fields.name: EXAONE
fields.description: LG AI Research's bilingual models. Strong in English and Korean with excellent reasoning and coding capabilities.

fields.name: Kimi
fields.description: Moonshot AI's multimodal and reasoning models. MoE architecture with strong coding agent performance.

fields.name: MiniMax
fields.description: MiniMax's language models for coding, agentic workflows, and professional productivity.

fields.name: LFM
fields.description: Liquid AI's hybrid models for edge deployment. Designed for efficient on-device inference.

fields.name: Gemma
fields.description: Google DeepMind's lightweight open models. Efficient and capable, designed to run well on consumer hardware including laptops and phones. Gemma 3 added vision capabilities and 128K context.

fields.name: SmolLM
fields.description: HuggingFace's compact models. Tiny models (135M-1.7B) for edge devices, trained on high-quality curated data.

fields.name: Qwen VL
fields.description: Qwen's vision-language models. Process images and video alongside text with strong visual understanding and reasoning capabilities.

fields.name: InternLM
fields.description: Shanghai AI Lab's open language models. Outstanding reasoning capability in compact sizes.

fields.name: CodeGemma
fields.description: Google's code-specialized Gemma models. Code completion, generation, and mathematical reasoning.

fields.name: OpenThinker
fields.description: Open-source reasoning models built by distilling DeepSeek-R1's chain-of-thought capabilities into smaller models.

fields.name: Mistral
fields.description: Mistral AI's core model family. Strong multilingual performance with efficient architectures. Known for excellent instruction following and tool use at compact sizes.

fields.name: Mixtral
fields.description: Mistral's Mixture-of-Experts models. Multiple expert networks activated selectively for high throughput and quality. Available in 8x7B and 8x22B configurations.

fields.name: Phi
fields.description: Microsoft Research's small language models. Demonstrate that carefully curated training data can produce models that punch well above their weight class in reasoning, math, and coding.

fields.name: DeepSeek
fields.description: DeepSeek's open reasoning and coding models. The R1 series uses chain-of-thought thinking tokens and approaches frontier model performance on math, logic, and code. The V3 series uses MoE with 671B total parameters.

fields.name: DeepSeek Coder
fields.description: DeepSeek's code-specialized models. Trained on 2 trillion code and natural language tokens. Strong code generation and understanding across many programming languages.

fields.name: fp16
fields.description: 16-bit floating point (standard unquantized).

fields.name: fp8
fields.description: 8-bit floating point.

fields.name: awq
fields.description: Activation-aware Weight Quantization.

fields.name: gptq
fields.description: Accurate Post-Training Quantization.

fields.name: gguf
fields.description: Standard format for local CPU/GPU inference via llama.cpp.

fields.name: Instruct
fields.description: Instruction-tuned for dialogue and tasks.

fields.name: Chat
fields.description: Optimized for conversational back-and-forth.

fields.name: Coder
fields.description: Fine-tuned specifically on programming languages.

fields.name: Reasoning
fields.description: Uses chain-of-thought or thinking tokens before replying.

fields.name: Embedding
fields.description: Converts text into mathematical vectors.

fields.name: Multimodal
fields.description: Handles vision, audio, or video inputs alongside text.

fields.name: Uncensored
fields.description: Alignment and safety guardrails removed.

fields.name: Standard Cloud
fields.description: Standard API routing with semantic fallback.

fields.name: Local First
fields.description: Prioritize free local models before touching the cloud.

fields.name: Strict Requirement
fields.description: Do not deviate from the requested model family.

fields.name: Local Fallback
fields.description: Attempt to route to a verified local Ollama model.

fields.name: Family Failover
fields.description: Attempt to route to a sibling model in the same family.

fields.name: Semantic Vector Search
fields.description: Use Hypothalamus pgvector to find the closest conceptual match.

fields.name: Strict Fail
fields.description: Halt execution and return a routing error.

fields.name: Ollama
fields.description: Local model inference via Ollama. Free, private, runs on consumer hardware.
